description: Use this API to add a participating bus voltage angle variable to a specified linear constraint dependency equation in the working case. It may also be used to modify an existing record. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.6.0. ierr = opf_lnceqn_vang_2(iqid, eibus, enode, coeff)

parameters.name: iqid
parameters.description: Linear constraint equation identification number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: enode
parameters.description: The bus section number or the external node number of one of the nodes in the bus section of interest. specify 0 if bus is represented by a single bus section. if 0 is specified and bus is represented by multiple bus sections, then the data of the main parent bus and not that of the bus sections will be changed. (input; Default of 0 by default).

parameters.name: coeff
parameters.description: Value of the coefficient associated with the equation variable. (input; Default value of 1.0 if new record, current value otherwise, by default).

error_codes.description: specified linear constraint equation does not exist.
participating equation variable table is full.
node not found in substation of bus.
node not connected to any bus section of bus in substation.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
